title: Invisible Horse Armor
description: Keep the defense, show the beauty.
body:
# Invisible Horse Armor
Tired of hiding rare, beautifully patterned horses under bulky metal plates? This lightweight resource pack makes all horse armor invisible, allowing your horse's unique coat and patterns to shine while keeping them fully protected. Whether you have a rare skeleton horse or a perfectly bred stallion, you can now maintain maximum defense stats without compromising on style. Perfect for builders and breeders who value aesthetics as much as protection.
